content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help — you saved me!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了，你帮了我大忙！
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Just reach out if you’re stuck.
No problem! Wishing you all the best with your exams!
My pleasure! Don’t hesitate to contact me if anything comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并表达了愿意继续支持
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的日常道别习惯

content.speakerText: I really appreciate all the advice you’ve given me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你给我的所有建议。
expectedAnswers: You’re very welcome! Feel free to reach out anytime.
I’m glad I could help! Good luck with everything ahead!
It was my pleasure — you’ve been a great student to work with!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了乐意帮助并积极收尾
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词搭配（如 reach out, be glad）
表达自然度：是否避免机械套用，有适当个性化表达

content.speakerText: Thanks for walking me through this process — it meant a lot.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你一步步指导我，这对我意义重大。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure. I’m truly happy I could support you.
Thank you for saying that! I’m here if you need more help later.
You’re very welcome — I’ve enjoyed helping you through this!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应并强化积极情感连接
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的情感表达词汇（如 truly happy, enjoyed）
表达自然度：是否避免公式化，体现真实人际互动感
